privileged_info_summary: The task requires resolving patient entities across two Oracle database tables (MASTER_PATIENT_INDEX and CLINIC_INTAKE) into a new table named PATIENT_LINKAGE. The connection parameters (hr/hr123 at localhost:1521/XEPDB1) are confirmed valid. The required columns for the output table are INTAKE_ID, MPI_ID, and MATCH_SCORE. A match threshold of 90 (using Jaro-Winkler similarity) is expected to correctly include planted fuzzy matches (e.g., Jonathan/Jonathon) while excluding traps (e.g., William/Bill). The final output must be exported to /home/ga/Desktop/linkage_report.csv. The task uses entirely synthetic data.
